title: Splitsvilla
subTitle: Young men and women go through various obstacles, challenges, and intense heartbreaks to find their perfect partner.

title: Kaisi Yeh Yaariaan
subTitle: Nandini tells Manik about Harshad's plan. Manik is shocked to know the truth about Kabir which he had kept secret until now. Manik confronts Kabir who confesses about his sexuality.

title: Night Out
subTitle: A compilation of the greatest foot-tapping hits to sing along to are played back to back in order to entertain the audience.

title: Roadies Real Heroes
subTitle: Various personal narratives from the contestants inspire the gang leaders. Later, they are moved by an aspirant's goal to enlist in the armed forces.
